title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 416.550 - Continuance of action as to nonresident
text:
416.550.  Continuance of action as to nonresident. — The court in which the action is pending shall grant such continuance to a nonresident defendant as may be proper to afford him reasonable opportunity to defend the action.
(L. 1959 H.B. 255 § 29)
